# Load necessary libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

# Remove Outliers Function
```{r}
remove_outliers <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE, ...) {
    qnt <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = na.rm, ...)
    H <- 1.5 * IQR(x, na.rm = na.rm)
    y <- x
    y[x < (qnt[1] - H)] <- NA
    y[x > (qnt[2] + H)] <- NA
    return(y)
}
```

# Load the data

```{r}

df <- read.csv("./results/model_evaluation_crossGenotype.csv")

df_filtered <- df %>%
    mutate(across(IoU, ~remove_outliers(.x))) %>%
    drop_na()
summary(df_filtered)
```

# IoU Difference across Genotypes

```{r}
# 0. Quick inspect (optional)
print("Preview df_filtered:")
print(head(df_filtered))
print("train_genotype unique values:")
print(unique(df_filtered$train_genotype))

# 1. Normalize labels and coerce numeric metrics
df_clean <- df_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    crop = trimws(tolower(as.character(crop))),
    train_genotype = trimws(tolower(as.character(train_genotype))),
    test_genotype = as.character(test_genotype),
    IoU = as.numeric(IoU),
    Precision = as.numeric(Precision),
    Recall = as.numeric(Recall),
    F1 = as.numeric(F1)
  )

# 2. Aggregate mean per group (in case multiple rows per group)
df_agg <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(crop, train_genotype, test_genotype) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_IoU = mean(IoU, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Precision = mean(Precision, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Recall = mean(Recall, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_F1 = mean(F1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Show groups with all-NA means (debug)
bad <- df_agg %>% filter(is.na(mean_IoU) & is.na(mean_Precision) & is.na(mean_Recall) & is.na(mean_F1))
if (nrow(bad) > 0) {
  message("Warning: some (crop,train_genotype,test_genotype) groups have all metrics NA. Example:")
  print(head(bad, 10))
}

# 3. Pivot wider so each train_genotype becomes columns for each metric
# We'll create separate wide tables per metric and then join, or pivot all at once with names_sep.
df_wide_all <- df_agg %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(crop, test_genotype),
    names_from = train_genotype,
    values_from = c(mean_IoU, mean_Precision, mean_Recall, mean_F1),
    names_sep = "__"
  )

# Debug: check column names
print("Columns after pivot:")
print(names(df_wide_all))
print("Preview:")
print(head(df_wide_all))

# 4. Identify actual column names for first_half and second_half (case-insensitive)
# Expected normalized train_genotype names:
first_name <- "first_half"
second_name <- "second_half"

# Build the expected wide column names
col_first_IoU   <- paste0("mean_IoU__", first_name)
col_second_IoU  <- paste0("mean_IoU__", second_name)
col_first_Prec  <- paste0("mean_Precision__", first_name)
col_second_Prec <- paste0("mean_Precision__", second_name)
col_first_Rec   <- paste0("mean_Recall__", first_name)
col_second_Rec  <- paste0("mean_Recall__", second_name)
col_first_F1    <- paste0("mean_F1__", first_name)
col_second_F1   <- paste0("mean_F1__", second_name)

# Check presence
missing_cols <- setdiff(
  c(col_first_IoU, col_second_IoU, col_first_Prec, col_second_Prec,
    col_first_Rec, col_second_Rec, col_first_F1, col_second_F1),
  names(df_wide_all)
)
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing expected pivot columns: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "),
       "\nCheck unique(train_genotype) values and adjust expected names accordingly.")
}

# 5. Compute differences: first_half - second_half for each metric
df_diff_metrics <- df_wide_all %>%
  mutate(
    diff_IoU       = as.numeric(.data[[col_first_IoU]]) - as.numeric(.data[[col_second_IoU]]),
    diff_Precision = as.numeric(.data[[col_first_Prec]]) - as.numeric(.data[[col_second_Prec]]),
    diff_Recall    = as.numeric(.data[[col_first_Rec]]) - as.numeric(.data[[col_second_Rec]]),
    diff_F1        = as.numeric(.data[[col_first_F1]]) - as.numeric(.data[[col_second_F1]])
  ) %>%
  select(crop, test_genotype, starts_with("diff_"))

# Preview differences
print("Preview differences:")
print(head(df_diff_metrics, 20))

# 6. Compute per-crop summary: mean, sd, n, CV% for each metric difference
# Pivot longer to compute summaries per metric uniformly
df_diff_long <- df_diff_metrics %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("diff_"), names_to = "metric", values_to = "diff_value") %>%
  mutate(metric = sub("^diff_", "", metric))  # remove prefix

df_summary_by_crop_metric <- df_diff_long %>%
  group_by(crop, metric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_diff = mean(diff_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_diff   = sd(diff_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(crop, metric)

# Print and save summary
print("Per-crop metric difference summary:")
print(df_summary_by_crop_metric)
write.csv(df_summary_by_crop_metric, "./results/metric_difference_crossGenotype.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
